title: Mob Cards: Blue
description: Changes spawn eggs into mob cards, with different card colors for different groups of mobs, and a blue portal as the back art for the cards.
body:
With this pack installed, spawn eggs will be changed into mob cards, these cards are divided into different colors and rarity ratings.

<details>
<summary>Card Colors</summary>

![card colors present in the pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4f94ad912532fa500f75140b7fa49024be9aac8.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Rarity Ratings</summary>

![The rarity ratings present in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8202c7ec25f1c71de4bf2ee3eea1cbf291b233ab.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Extra Cards</summary>
Inspired by resource packs such as the EGGS!(by DeltaV) and Visuals(by thanos), this pack includes various card designs for mob variants and even the unused mobs of the game. Those designs can be accessed through the use commands, which are listed in the "extra_card_commands.txt" file included with the pack's files.

</details>

**Extra details**

- the zip file can just be dragged and dropped in your "resourcepacks" folder, unzipping isn't required;
- This pack has two alternate versions with different back art options for the mob cards: [Nether](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mob-cards-nether) and [End](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mob-cards-end).
